title: elymus semicostatus subsp. thomsonii
intro: Elymus semicostatus subsp. thomsonii is a subspecies of grass native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Elymus semicostatus subsp. thomsonii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Elymus semicostatus subsp. thomsonii include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
